use_codes.desc: REVERSAL AGENT OR ANTAGONIST OF NONDEPOLARIZING NEUROMUSCULAR BLOCKING AGENTS

indications.text:
ENLON-PLUS (edrophonium chloride, USP and atropine sulfate, USP) Injection is recommended as a
reversal agent or antagonist of nondepolarizing neuromuscular blocking agents. It is not effective
against depolarizing neuromuscular blocking agents. It is also useful if used adjunctively in the
treatmen...
